title: Intelligence Community Analysis
public_claim: Intelligence Community Analysis is an intelligence-enterprise map for understanding agencies, missions, collection disciplines, oversight, and analytic standards.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes the reader through mission, agency role, collection discipline, analytic production, oversight, and standards so claims about the intelligence community are tied to institutional function.
use_value: It matters because intelligence work is not one generic activity; it is a system of roles, authorities, collection paths, and review obligations.
